title: Universal Basic Income
summary: 'Operation UBI' — the record's forecast of global basic income, swinging between planetary provision and the control mechanism attached to the chip.
markdown:
**Universal Basic Income** is one of the record's most persistent forecasts — eight
sessions across 2020–2023, a dedicated session title (October 22, 2020), and its own
operation name. In the utopian register, the October 2020 session promises provision:
*"Universal Basic income will be global for you all, becoming a planetary civilization...
to provide all inhabitants of this planet a complete balanced fairness to support life on
a basic level."* The next night's session gives it the operational stamp: *"On all country
initiated 2020: Operation UBI"* — with the pandemic named as *"catalyst."*

But the record refuses to leave it benign. By the February 2023
[John Toth](/lore/john-toth/) session, the same program appears in the description of a
*"totalitarian society, for efficiency control of our citizens, through universal basic
income and quantum brain chip"* — UBI as the stipend side of the
[Neuro-Net](/lore/neuro-net-chip/) bargain, the payment that comes with the interface.

That double vision is the entry's real content: the record forecasts the same instrument
twice — once as the floor under a [post-scarcity](/lore/3d-printing/) civilization, once
as the leash of a monitored one — and, characteristically, insists the difference is not
the technology but the [timeline](/lore/positive-timeline/).
